title: tilia × pallida
intro: Tilia × pallida, also known as the silver lime tree or small-leaved lime, is a deciduous tree that is a hybrid of Tilia cordata and Tilia platyphyllos. The leaves and flowers of the Tilia × pallida plant have been used in herbal medicine for centuries due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of the plant help to soothe the respiratory system, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote restful sleep, offering various health benefits such as relief from insomnia and improved mood. Tilia × pallida is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its flowers can also be used to make a calming and fragrant herbal oil.
